base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of castle_brick_special_3color — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Castle brick tile using bg-color-as-extra — looks 4-color but actually only uses 3 palette entries + the background-color register. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Castle brick tile using bg-color-as-extra — looks 4-color but actually only uses 3 palette entries + the background-color register; artifact of NES palette-slot trick unique to castle levels
